workflow_steps.step_prompt: A windmill spins its sails steadily in place while its gear turns slowly, then the front door creaks open slightly and closes again. The animation should loop nicely.
The sails of the windmill should start and stop spinning gradually. They also should spin in the opposite direction.
The door should open fully instead of slightly in the beginning, stay open for 2 seconds, then close again before the windmill starts spinning.
